title: messages: deserialize validators for FileChunk/FileHeader are correct and should be preserved
description: The custom deserializers for FileHeader (file name path-traversal rejection, sha256_hex format, total_chunks 1-1024) and FileChunk (10 MiB cap) enforce protocol boundaries at the serde layer before any application code runs. A future refactor that moves these checks to application code would create a window where hostile input is allocated but not validated. The serde-layer approach is correct and should be preserved.
